response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to event-driven architectures and some AI-agent infrastructure. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of executive-level leadership in fintech or agentic AI systems at scale, and no direct experience with regulated financial environments or multi-agent frameworks in production is highlighted.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems, microservices, and event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq).
Proven ability to scale engineering practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, observability) and mentor teams.
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., CTO, VP Engineering) or track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Limited evidence of fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, regulatory compliance, real-time risk modeling).
Agentic AI experience appears peripheral (e.g., tooling contributions) rather than core architecture ownership.
